messages.body:
$VSA $HUBC $CREG 

$VSA 600K float, unfortunately i was on the wrong side of it today

Maybe bulls can get some Wednesday redemption 🤔 

We haven't seen a micro cap do $20+ for a while

Its all been .10-.30 screaming to a dollar, then retracement.

In some cases 3-5 range 

All that being said, trade well bulls 

Condolences $HKIT wasn't groovy

messages.body: All in all, a great session today. We didn’t get the exact $HUBC break we wanted, but the profit opportunities from the levels and game plans more than made up for it. Great patience and execution across the board. Let’s come back ready to attack tomorrow’s session. The opportunities aren’t over. $BJDX $PMI $VSA $GXAI
